query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: A high-contrast black and white image showing a diagonal staircase-like arrangement of bright pixelated squares ascending from lower left to upper right against a solid black background. Each square is composed of dense clusters of small white dots, with the dot patterns varying in coarseness across the squares. Scattered white specks pepper the black background throughout the frame. The squares decrease in apparent density and coarseness toward the lower left, becoming sparser and more fragmented.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A high-contrast black and white abstract image with heavy digital and analog degradation effects, showing a diagonal staircase-like arrangement of bright pixelated squares ascending from lower left to upper right against a solid black background. Each square is composed of dense clusters of small white dots with significant artifacting, coarse dithering, and scanline-like textures that create a retro digital or VHS-style decay aesthetic. The dot patterns are smeared and mushy with bad detail resolution, varying in coarseness across the squares. Scattered white noise specks pepper the black background throughout the frame, enhancing the degraded signal appearance. The squares decrease in density and become more fragmented toward the lower left, dissolving into near-unrecognizable abstraction where subjects lose all clear form.
